title: Deterministic constraint checker for directive pipeline
description: Replace prose-based ALWAYS rules and reviewer checklists with deterministic, machine-checkable constraints. Build a constraint system: (1) constraint definitions as structured data (pattern, severity, remediation), (2) a checker script that validates directive outputs against constraints, (3) integration into the pipeline as a mandatory pre-review gate, (4) escalation ladder (warn → block → critical). Not a custom ESLint plugin — a standalone checker that reads constraint definitions and validates file changes / plan JSON / code output.

in: Constraint definition format (JSON): pattern, severity, remediation text, applies_to
Checker script (TypeScript) that loads constraints and validates against git diff, plan JSON, reviewer JSON
Seed constraints: standing corrections from preferences.md, ALWAYS rules from SKILL.md, known footguns from lessons.md
Pipeline integration: mandatory check between build and review steps
Escalation ladder: info (log only) → warn (report in digest) → block (fail review) → critical (halt directive)
Clear output format showing which constraints passed/failed with remediation steps
out: Runtime code analysis (AST parsing, type checking)

dod.criterion: Constraint definition format documented with 3+ example constraints
Checker script runs against a git diff and returns structured pass/fail results
All 4 standing corrections from preferences.md are encoded as constraints
Pipeline invokes checker before review step — failures block review
Escalation ladder works: info constraints don't block, critical constraints halt

checklist: Run checker against a known-violating diff — confirms it catches violations
Run checker against a clean diff — confirms no false positives
Verify pipeline integration: build step output passes through checker before reaching reviewer
Verify escalation: info constraint only logs, block constraint fails review, critical halts

reviewers.domain: architecture — script correctness, constraint format sanity, no over-engineering
process — pipeline flow preserved, escalation ladder makes sense

tasks.title: Design constraint definition format and escalation ladder
Seed constraint definitions from standing corrections, ALWAYS rules, and lessons.md footguns
Build checker script — load constraints, validate against git diff + plan JSON + reviewer JSON
Integrate checker into pipeline as pre-review gate in step docs
Test against known-good and known-bad diffs — validate catch rate and false positive rate
